description: Join Stripe's Data team to build dashboards and reports that inform product decisions. You'll write SQL, explore large datasets, and present findings to PMs and engineers.
Work alongside Figma's product design team to craft new features used by millions of designers. Contribute to full design cycles from research to high-fidelity prototypes.
Apply machine learning and statistical modeling to real financial datasets. Work on alpha research, signal development, and strategy backtesting in a rigorous quant environment.
Help Spotify's personalization team improve recommendation algorithms. Analyze listening behavior, run A/B tests, and build models that power Discover Weekly and Daily Mixes.
Support HubSpot's growth marketing team by analyzing campaign performance, building attribution models, and creating Tableau dashboards for the CMO.
Embed with a government or enterprise client and build custom data pipelines and dashboards using Palantir Foundry. Requires adaptability and strong communication skills.
Rotate through deal teams building financial models, creating pitch books, and supporting M&A and capital markets transactions. Fast-paced and client-facing environment.
Plan and conduct user studies — interviews, usability tests, diary studies — and synthesize insights to influence product direction for Airbnb's host and guest experiences.
Run lifecycle email and SMS campaigns for Klaviyo's SMB segment. Set up automated flows, write copy, run split tests, and report on open rates, clicks, and revenue impact.
Build and maintain BI dashboards in Sigma Computing on top of Snowflake's own data warehouse. Partner with Finance and Sales Ops to automate recurring reports.
